raw_text: P1 incident: users across North America cannot log in to the customer portal after this morning's IAM certificate update. MFA also appears impacted for some tenants. Multiple enterprise customers reporting outage.
normalized_text: p1 incident users across north america cannot log in to the customer portal after this morning iam certificate update mfa impacted multiple enterprise customers reporting outage
title: North America Login Outage — IAM Certificate Failure
summary: Authentication failures across North America after IAM certificate update; MFA impacted for some tenants.

raw_text: P2 incident: increased latency in EU checkout flow, payment confirmation delayed for some users, no full outage observed.
normalized_text: p2 incident increased latency in eu checkout flow payment confirmation delayed for some users no full outage observed
title: EU Payment Latency
summary: Checkout latency affecting EU region with delayed payment confirmation but no full outage.

raw_text: P2 incident: CDN cache serving stale static assets after deployment, users seeing inconsistent front-end behavior.
normalized_text: p2 incident cdn cache serving stale static assets after deployment users seeing inconsistent front end behavior
title: CDN Cache Stale Assets
summary: Stale CDN assets after deployment causing inconsistent UI behavior.

raw_text: P1 security incident: suspicious admin activity detected after a privileged support session. Multiple enterprise tenants report forced MFA resets and anomalous login failures. Possible misuse of identity admin privileges or support workflow token.
normalized_text: p1 security incident suspicious admin activity detected after a privileged support session multiple enterprise tenants report forced mfa resets and anomalous login failures possible misuse of identity admin privileges or support workflow token
title: Suspicious Admin Activity — Forced MFA Reset Pattern
summary: Suspicious admin activity may have triggered forced MFA resets and anomalous login failures across multiple enterprise tenants.

raw_text: P1 incident: customer portal outage after application config drift. Service now listens on port 81, but network policy still permits only port 80. Requests are timing out across production.
normalized_text: p1 incident customer portal outage after application config drift service now listens on port 81 but network policy still permits only port 80 requests are timing out across production
title: Config Drift Outage — Port 81 Not Allowed by Network Policy
summary: Service port changed to 81 but network policy still allows only 80, causing production timeouts.
